title: Kazakhstan Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person — Schedule 250.06 (Receivables/Payables and Property in Trust Management)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "форма 250.06 — Сведения о наличии дебиторской/кредиторской задолженности; сведения об имуществе, переданному в доверительное управление" (Form 250.06, receivables/payables debt and property transferred to trust management), Appendix 6 to the Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person (Form 250.00, `kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities`, GOV-4043). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 250.00 whenever the declarant marks gating item 12 (receivables/payables) and/or item 13 (property in trust management) on the main declaration — modelled on the parent schema as `hasReceivablesOrPayables` and `hasTrustProperty`. Approved as Appendix 6 to the Declaration (itself part of Appendix 10 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025), published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 250.06 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header (items 1-2, shared with the other five 250.0X schedules) and both of its own repeating sections: receivables/payables debt, including outside the Republic of Kazakhstan (item 12, up to the four rows the reference specimen prints — debt-type indicator, counterparty identification number, counterparty full name/entity name, country code, currency code, debt amount as of 31 December, and basis for the debt) and property transferred to trust management (item 13, the same four rows — property name, identification/cadastral number, trust manager's IIN/BIN, and the start/end dates of the trust management arrangement). This is the sixth and last of the six disclosed companion schedules (Forms 250.01-250.06) to Form 250.00, closing the entire series — see the parent document's own description and VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 6 к Декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица (форма 250.00), Приложение 10 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 250.06

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4085, closing Kazakhstan's Form 250.0X companion-schedule series by authoring the sixth and last of the six disclosed schedules to Form 250.00 (kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities, GOV-4043) — schedules 250.01-250.05 were already authored across five prior cycles (GOV-4050, GOV-4057, GOV-4064, GOV-4071, GOV-4078), leaving 250.06 as the only remaining candidate, not a choice among several. Fetched the schedule's own page image fresh this cycle (curl -k, https://adilet.zan.kz/files/1576/49/202.jpg, HTTP 200, 142,690 bytes — the same byte size the GOV-4057 cycle's own boundary check against 250.05 had already recorded, confirming stability), upscaled 4x with sharp for legibility, and read it directly to transcribe both sections in full. Both sections print exactly 4 blank rows above their own worked example row (re-counted via a dedicated crop of each section) — unlike the GOV-4078 cycle's 3-way row-count gradient (4/3/2) on Form 250.04, this schedule's two sections are uniform at 4 rows each; recorded here for completeness rather than treated as a novel finding. Item 12's own footnotes state the classification directly: column B takes the letters 'Кт' (creditor debt — задолженность перед физическими/юридическими лицами, i.e. an amount the declarant owes) or 'Дт' (debtor debt — задолженность физических/юридических лиц перед Вами, i.e. an amount owed to the declarant), modelled as a two-value enum (payable/receivable) following the same english-semantic-enum convention already established on the parent Form 250.00 schema's own residencyStatus and declarationType fields; column E cites the same two-letter country-code classifier and column F the same three-letter currency-code classifier (both per Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) already established across the entire 250.0X family. Item 12's own prose note above the table states that debt to banks and organizations carrying out certain banking operations is NOT reflected in this section, except debt to such banks/organizations located outside the Republic of Kazakhstan — disclosed here as a scope note on the section rather than modelled as a validation rule, since the schema cannot verify the counterparty's own regulatory status. Item 13 prints no footnotes or scope-note prose, only column headers; its own trust-manager identification column (ИИН/БИН доверительного управляющего) is modelled with the same 12-digit numeric pattern as the parent form's own `iin` field, since both Kazakhstan's IIN (individuals) and BIN (legal entities) share that 12-digit format — a disclosed judgment call, as the page prints only a single box with no separate indicator of which of the two identifier types applies. The order's own explanatory chapter for Form 250.06 was not independently cross-checked this cycle (the same adilet.zan.kz HTML endpoint 504 timeout documented on the GOV-4057/GOV-4064/GOV-4071/GOV-4078 cycles was reconfirmed on two attempts this cycle too), but every column meaning and both classifier citations needed to author this schema were available directly on the page image itself, consistent with every prior schedule in this series. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The declarant's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 250.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: representedPersonIin
fields.label: ИИН представляемого лица
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN of the minor and/or legally incapacitated person being represented, if this schedule is filed by a legal representative. The schedule page prints only a single IIN box here, unlike the main Form 250.00 declaration's own separate boolean gate and name fields for the same case.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this schedule page, printed in a box at the top right of every page of this schedule (relevant when more than one page is filed to list additional rows).

fields.name: debtEntry1Type
fields.label: Вид задолженности (строка 1)
fields.description: Whether row 1 reports a debt the declarant owes to another person/entity (creditor debt — Кт, задолженность перед физическими/юридическими лицами) or a debt owed to the declarant by another person/entity (debtor debt — Дт, задолженность физических/юридических лиц перед Вами). Filled only where a contract or other document forms the basis of the obligation or claim; debt to banks and organizations carrying out certain banking operations is not reflected here, except debt to such banks/organizations located outside the Republic of Kazakhstan.
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 12), row 1, column B — footnote "*В графе В укажите буквы «Кт» - в случае кредиторской задолженности ..., «Дт» - в случае дебиторской задолженности ..."

fields.name: debtEntry1CounterpartyId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер дебитора/кредитора (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification number of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 1 (the worked example shows a 12-digit KZ IIN/BIN, but the section explicitly includes counterparties outside the Republic of Kazakhstan, so this is modelled as free text rather than constrained to the 12-digit KZ format).

fields.name: debtEntry1CounterpartyName
fields.label: ФИО/наименование дебитора/кредитора (строка 1)
fields.description: The full name (for an individual) or entity name (for a legal person) of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 1.

fields.name: debtEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны регистрации Дт/Кт (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the counterparty in row 1 is registered, per the Classifier of World Countries (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same classifier and two-letter convention already established across the 250.0X schedule family.

fields.name: debtEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the debt amount in row 1, per the Classifier of Currencies (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same letter-based classifier already established across the 250.0X schedule family.

fields.name: debtEntry1Amount
fields.label: Сумма задолженности по состоянию на 31 декабря (строка 1)
fields.description: The debt amount as of 31 December in row 1, in the currency stated in debtEntry1CurrencyCode. Printed on the page as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups, modelled here as a single numeric amount per this registry's established KZ 220.0X/250.0X convention.

fields.name: debtEntry1Basis
fields.label: Основание для задолженности (строка 1)
fields.description: The basis for the debt in row 1 (e.g. notarization, a court decision, or a reconciliation act — нотариальное заверение, решение суда, акт сверки, per the printed worked example).

fields.name: debtEntry2Type
fields.label: Вид задолженности (строка 2)
fields.description: Whether row 2 reports a creditor debt (Кт) or a debtor debt (Дт). See debtEntry1Type for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry2CounterpartyId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер дебитора/кредитора (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification number of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 2. See debtEntry1CounterpartyId for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry2CounterpartyName
fields.label: ФИО/наименование дебитора/кредитора (строка 2)
fields.description: The full name or entity name of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 2.

fields.name: debtEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны регистрации Дт/Кт (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the counterparty in row 2 is registered. See debtEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the debt amount in row 2. See debtEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry2Amount
fields.label: Сумма задолженности по состоянию на 31 декабря (строка 2)
fields.description: The debt amount as of 31 December in row 2, in the currency stated in debtEntry2CurrencyCode.

fields.name: debtEntry2Basis
fields.label: Основание для задолженности (строка 2)
fields.description: The basis for the debt in row 2. See debtEntry1Basis for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry3Type
fields.label: Вид задолженности (строка 3)
fields.description: Whether row 3 reports a creditor debt (Кт) or a debtor debt (Дт). See debtEntry1Type for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry3CounterpartyId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер дебитора/кредитора (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification number of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 3. See debtEntry1CounterpartyId for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry3CounterpartyName
fields.label: ФИО/наименование дебитора/кредитора (строка 3)
fields.description: The full name or entity name of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 3.

fields.name: debtEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны регистрации Дт/Кт (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the counterparty in row 3 is registered. See debtEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry3CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 3)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the debt amount in row 3. See debtEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry3Amount
fields.label: Сумма задолженности по состоянию на 31 декабря (строка 3)
fields.description: The debt amount as of 31 December in row 3, in the currency stated in debtEntry3CurrencyCode.

fields.name: debtEntry3Basis
fields.label: Основание для задолженности (строка 3)
fields.description: The basis for the debt in row 3. See debtEntry1Basis for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry4Type
fields.label: Вид задолженности (строка 4)
fields.description: Whether row 4 reports a creditor debt (Кт) or a debtor debt (Дт). See debtEntry1Type for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry4CounterpartyId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер дебитора/кредитора (строка 4)
fields.description: The identification number of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 4. See debtEntry1CounterpartyId for the full description.

fields.name: debtEntry4CounterpartyName
fields.label: ФИО/наименование дебитора/кредитора (строка 4)
fields.description: The full name or entity name of the debtor/creditor counterparty in row 4.

fields.name: debtEntry4CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны регистрации Дт/Кт (строка 4)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the counterparty in row 4 is registered. See debtEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry4CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 4)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the debt amount in row 4. See debtEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: debtEntry4Amount
fields.label: Сумма задолженности по состоянию на 31 декабря (строка 4)
fields.description: The debt amount as of 31 December in row 4, in the currency stated in debtEntry4CurrencyCode.

fields.name: debtEntry4Basis
fields.label: Основание для задолженности (строка 4)
fields.description: The basis for the debt in row 4. See debtEntry1Basis for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry1PropertyName
fields.label: Наименование имущества (объекта) (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the property transferred to trust management reported in row 1 (e.g. квартира, per the printed worked example).

fields.name: trustEntry1IdentificationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (кадастровый) номер имущества (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification (cadastral) number of the property in row 1 (e.g. a real-estate cadastral number, per the printed worked example "11:22:334444:555").

fields.name: trustEntry1ManagerId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер ИИН/БИН доверительного управляющего (строка 1)
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN (if the trust manager is an individual) or BIN (if the trust manager is a legal entity) of the trust manager for row 1. The page prints a single identification box with no separate indicator of which of the two identifier types applies; both share the same 12-digit numeric format in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: trustEntry1StartDate
fields.label: Дата начала доверительного управления (строка 1)
fields.description: The start date of the trust management arrangement in row 1.

fields.name: trustEntry1EndDate
fields.label: Дата окончания доверительного управления (строка 1)
fields.description: The end date of the trust management arrangement in row 1.

fields.name: trustEntry2PropertyName
fields.label: Наименование имущества (объекта) (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the property transferred to trust management reported in row 2. See trustEntry1PropertyName for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry2IdentificationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (кадастровый) номер имущества (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification (cadastral) number of the property in row 2. See trustEntry1IdentificationNumber for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry2ManagerId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер ИИН/БИН доверительного управляющего (строка 2)
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN or BIN of the trust manager for row 2. See trustEntry1ManagerId for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry2StartDate
fields.label: Дата начала доверительного управления (строка 2)
fields.description: The start date of the trust management arrangement in row 2.

fields.name: trustEntry2EndDate
fields.label: Дата окончания доверительного управления (строка 2)
fields.description: The end date of the trust management arrangement in row 2.

fields.name: trustEntry3PropertyName
fields.label: Наименование имущества (объекта) (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the property transferred to trust management reported in row 3. See trustEntry1PropertyName for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry3StartDate

fields.name: trustEntry3EndDate
fields.label: Дата окончания доверительного управления (строка 3)

fields.name: trustEntry4PropertyName
fields.label: Наименование имущества (объекта) (строка 4)
fields.description: The name of the property transferred to trust management reported in row 4. See trustEntry1PropertyName for the full description.

fields.name: trustEntry4IdentificationNumber

fields.name: trustEntry4ManagerId
